cat > /tmp/find_deprecated.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash

# Files in staging/src/k8s.io/api that define Deprecated identifiers
staging_files=(
  "staging/src/k8s.io/api/core/v1/annotation_key_constants.go"
  "staging/src/k8s.io/api/core/v1/types.go"
  "staging/src/k8s.io/api/apps/v1/types.go"
  "staging/src/k8s.io/api/apps/v1beta2/types.go"
  "staging/src/k8s.io/api/discovery/v1/types.go"
  "staging/src/k8s.io/api/events/v1/types.go"
  "staging/src/k8s.io/api/events/v1beta1/types.go"
)

# Files in pkg/apis that define Deprecated identifiers
pkg_files=(
  "pkg/apis/core/annotation_key_constants.go"
  "pkg/apis/discovery/types.go"
)

echo "=== Files in staging/src/k8s.io/api that DEFINE Deprecated identifiers ==="
for f in "${staging_files[@]}"; do
  if grep -q "^[[:space:]]*Deprecated[A-Z]" "/workspace/kubernetes/$f"; then
    echo "$f"
  fi
done

echo ""
echo "=== Files in pkg/apis that DEFINE Deprecated identifiers ==="
for f in "${pkg_files[@]}"; do
  if grep -q "^[[:space:]]*Deprecated[A-Z]" "/workspace/kubernetes/$f"; then
    echo "$f"
  fi
done
EOF
chmod +x /tmp/find_deprecated.sh
/tmp/find_deprecated.sh
